element_introduction_order.mastery_context: persistent threat throughout, converted to collectable fruit via shooting mechanics
variant enemy type, thematic complement to insect enemies
core loop mechanic—shooting enemies converts them to collectables rather than simple destruction

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: continuous vertical scrolling pressure with reward cycles tied to enemy conversion mechanics; anxiety-inducing atmosphere via music and enemy design

difficulty_curve.early_game: introduction to insect/skull enemies and fruit conversion mechanic

notable_level_patterns.description: continuous vertical scroll with enemy waves featuring insect and skull-themed designs; players convert enemies to fruit collectables via shooting
inorganic backgrounds paired with mysterious, anxiety-inducing music create a unique aesthetic tension separate from mechanical difficulty
